name: expo-developer
description: Expo/React Native developer tools with dependency validation

default_action.title: Default action
default_action.description: Default behavior for the expo-dependency-check skill. Accepted values: "ask" (prompt the user), "check" (run `expo install --check` non-interactively), or "fix" (run `expo install --fix` non-interactively).

package_manager_override.title: Package manager override
package_manager_override.description: Override lockfile-based package-manager detection. Accepted non-empty values: "npm", "pnpm", "yarn", or "bun". Leave empty to detect from lockfiles (default).
